name: Cyndi Lauper
abstract: Cynthia Ann Stephanie Lauper ( LAW-pər; born June 22, 1953) is an American singer, songwriter and actress. Lauper is known for her distinctive image, which features eccentric clothing and a variety of hair colors.

about_quotes.speaker: Catherine Russell
about_quotes.evidence: Mainly I worked with Cyndi Lauper, I worked in her band for four years in the 90s.
about_quotes.doc_title: Catherine Russell interviewed by Monk Rowe, Utica, New York, October 26, 2018

about_quotes.speaker: Wilson "Chembo" Corniel
about_quotes.evidence: Cyndi Lauper did one but hers came out really good. Singing in English, Cyndi Lauper with real arrangements in clave, real musicians that know the stuff, and hip arrangements.
about_quotes.doc_title: Wilson "Chembo" Corniel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, November 15, 2019

about_quotes.speaker: Bob Kinkel
about_quotes.evidence: the day I started Cyndi Lauper was doing her debut record in Studio B
about_quotes.doc_title: Bob Kinkel interviewed by Monk Rowe, Clinton, New York, October 31, 2012
